raw.problem: Flood-irrigated farms waste 40% of freshwater in key basins.
raw.opportunity_size: India uses 80% of freshwater for agriculture; 40% is wasted.
raw.why_now: Groundwater depletion laws now restrict free extraction.
raw.gtm: Micro-drip sold via FPO bulk deals.
raw.success_scenario: If water entitlements tighten, adoption is forced.
